title: Palindrome — compare with the reverse
problem: Decide whether a word reads the same forwards and backwards.

trace.checkpoint_prompt: s[::-1] is s reversed. After `is_palindrome = s == s[::-1]` runs, what will is_palindrome be?

trace.note: s[::-1] is the whole string reversed; comparing s to its reverse IS the palindrome check, in one line. 'racecar' reversed is still 'racecar', so is_palindrome is True.
